subcodes.first_line: O ye two sincere servants of the Abha Beauty! Your letter was received, and its meanings were preserved in the pages of the heart [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای دو بنده صادق جمال ابهی مکتوب مرقوم ملحوظ گردید و معانی در صحائف قلب محفوظ
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @praise and encouragement, @trust and reliance in God; turning to Him at all times
